Vt({autoplay:!1,onBegin:()=>this.dataTimer.resume(),onUpdate:()=>{let s=this.backwardX||this.backwardY;W(this,i=>i.handleScroll(),s)},onComplete:()=>this.dataTimer.pause()}).init(),this.dataTimer=new Vt({autoplay:!1,frameRate:30,onUpdate:s=>{let i=s.deltaTime,n=this.prevScrollX,o=this.prevScrollY,r=this.scrollX,l=this.scrollY,a=n-r,c=o-l;this.prevScrollX=r,this.prevScrollY=l,a&&(this.backwardX=n>r),c&&(this.backwardY=o>l),this.velocity=z(i>0?Math.sqrt(a*a+c*c)/i:0,5)}}).init(),this.resizeTicker=new Vt({autoplay:!1,duration:250*M.timeScale,onComplete:()=>{this.updateWindowBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}}).init(),this.wakeTicker=new Vt({autoplay:!1,duration:500*M.timeScale,onBegin:()=>{this.scrollTicker.resume()},onComplete:()=>{this.scrollTicker.pause()}}).init(),this._head=null,this._tail=null,this.updateScrollCoords(),this.updateWindowBounds(),this.updateBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll(),this.resizeObserver=new ResizeObserver(()=>this.resizeTicker.restart()),this.resizeObserver.observe(this.element),(this.useWin?Kt:this.element).addEventListener("scroll",this,!1)}updateScrollCoords(){let t=this.useWin,s=this.element;this.scrollX=z(t?Kt.scrollX:s.scrollLeft,0),this.scrollY=z(t?Kt.scrollY:s.scrollTop,0)}updateWindowBounds(){this.winWidth=Kt.innerWidth,this.winHeight=cr()}updateBounds(){let t=getComputedStyle(this.element),s=this.element;this.scrollWidth=s.scrollWidth+parseFloat(t.marginLeft)+parseFloat(t.marginRight),this.scrollHeight=s.scrollHeight+parseFloat(t.marginTop)+parseFloat(t.marginBottom),this.updateWindowBounds();let i,n;if(this.useWin)i=this.winWidth,n=this.winHeight;else{let o=s.getBoundingClientRect();i=s.clientWidth,n=s.clientHeight,this.top=o.top,this.left=o.left,this.scale=o.width?i/o.width:o.height?n/o.height:1}this.width=i,this.height=n}refreshScrollObservers(){W(this,t=>{t._debug&&t.removeDebug()}),this.updateBounds(),W(this,t=>{t.refresh(),t.onResize(t),t._debug&&t.debug()})}refresh(){this.updateWindowBounds(),this.updateBounds(),this.refreshScrollObservers(),this.handleScroll()}handleScroll(){this.updateScrollCoords(),this.wakeTicker.restart()}handleEvent(t){t.type==="scroll"&&this.handleScroll()}revert(){this.scrollTicker.cancel(),this.dataTimer.cancel(),this.resizeTicker.cancel(),this.wakeTicker.cancel(),this.resizeObserver.disconnect(),(this.useWin?Kt:this.element).removeEventListener("scroll",this),Fs.delete(this.element)}},hr=e=>{let t=e?ye(e)[0]||j.body:j.body,s=Fs.get(t);return s||(s=new Li(t),Fs.set(t,s)),s},rs=(e,t,s,i,n)=>{let speed(t){this._speed=+t,this.forEach(s=>s.playbackRate=t)}get currentTime(){let t=this.controlAnimation,s=M.timeScale;return this.completed?this.duration:t?+t.currentTime*(s===1?1:s):0}set currentTime(t){let s=t*(M.timeScale===1?1:Ht);this.forEach(i=>{!this.persist&&s>=this.duration&&i.play(),i.currentTime=s})}get progress(){return this.currentTime/this.duration}set progress(t){this.forEach(s=>s.currentTime=t*this.duration||0)}resume(){return this.paused?(this.paused=!1,this.forEach("play")):this}pause(){return this.paused?this:(this.paused=!0,this.forEach("pause"))}alternate(){return this.reversed=!this.reversed,this.forEach("reverse"),this.paused&&this.forEach("pause"),this}play(){return this.reversed&&this.alternate(),this.resume()}reverse(){return this.reversed||this.alternate(),this.resume()}seek(t,s=!1){return s&&(this.muteCallbacks=!0),t<this.duration&&(this.completed=!1),this.currentTime=t,this.muteCallbacks=!1,this.paused&&this.pause(),this}restart(){return this.completed=!1,this.seek(0,!0).resume()}commitStyles(){return this.forEach("commitStyles")}complete(){return this.seek(this.duration)}cancel(){return this.muteCallbacks=!0,this.commitStyles().forEach("cancel"),this.animations.length=0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.targets.forEach(t=>{t.style.transform==="none"&&t.style.removeProperty("transform")})}),this}revert(){return r=n[o];S(r)||r===xt?i.removeProperty(Fe(o)):t.style[o]=r}t.getAttribute("style")===xt&&t.removeAttribute("style")}),this}then(t=$){let s=this.then,i=()=>{this.then=null,t(this),this.then=s,this._resolve=$};return new Promise(n=>(this._resolve=()=>n(i()),this.completed&&this._resolve(),this))}},Kn={animate:(e,t)=>new ki(e,t),convertEase:Ms};var mr=0,gr=0,Hs=(e,t)=>!e||!t?!1:e===t||e.contains(t),We=e=>{if(!e)return null;let t=e.style,s=t.transition||"";return n=i.type.includes("touch"),o=i.type.includes("wheel");this.isTouching=i.type==="touchstart"||i.type==="touchmove";let r=t===0&&s===0;if(this.options.syncTouch&&n&&i.type==="touchstart"&&r&&!this.isStopped&&!this.isLocked){this.reset();return}let a=this.options.gestureOrientation==="vertical"&&s===0||this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&t===0;if(r||a)return;let c=i.composedPath();c=c.slice(0,c.indexOf(this.rootElement));let d=this.options.prevent,u=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical";if(c.find(v=>v instanceof HTMLElement&&(typeof d=="function"&&d?.(v)||v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent")||u==="vertical"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-vertical")||u==="horizontal"&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-horizontal")||n&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-touch")||o&&v.hasAttribute?.("data-lenis-prevent-wheel")||this.options.allowNestedScroll&&this.hasNestedScroll(v,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}))))return;if(this.isStopped||this.isLocked){i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();return}if(!(this.options.syncTouch&&n||this.options.smoothWheel&&o)){this.isScrolling="native",this.animate.stop(),i.lenisStopPropagation=!0;return}let T=s;this.options.gestureOrientation==="both"?T=Math.abs(s)>Math.abs(t)?s:t:this.options.gestureOrientation==="horizontal"&&(T=t),(!this.options.overscroll||this.options.infinite||this.options.wrapper!==window&&this.limit>0&&(this.animatedScroll>0&&this.animatedScroll<this.limit||this.animatedScroll===0&&s>0||this.animatedScroll===this.limit&&s<0))&&(i.lenisStopPropagation=!0),i.cancelable&&i.preventDefault();let m=n&&this.options.syncTouch,f=n&&i.type==="touchend";f&&(T=Math.sign(this.velocity)*Math.abs(this.velocity)**this.options.touchInertiaExponent),this.scrollTo(this.targetScroll+T,{programmatic:!1,...m?{lerp:f?this.options.syncTouchLerp:1}:{lerp:this.options.lerp,duration:this.options.duration,easing:this.options.easing}})};resize(){this.dimensions.resize(),this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.emit()}emit(){this.emitter.emit("scroll",this)}onNativeScroll=()=>{if(this._resetVelocityTimeout!==null&&(clearTimeout(this._resetVelocityTimeout),this._resetVelocityTimeout=null),this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1;return}if(this.isScrolling===!1||this.isScrolling==="native"){let e=this.animatedScroll;this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=this.animatedScroll-e,this.direction=Math.sign(this.animatedScroll-e),this.isStopped||(this.isScrolling="native"),this.emit(),this.velocity!==0&&(this._resetVelocityTimeout=setTimeout(()=>{this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=0,this.isScrolling=!1,this.emit()},400))}};reset(){this.isLocked=!1,this.isScrolling=!1,this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=this.actualScroll,this.lastVelocity=this.velocity=0,this.animate.stop()}start(){if(this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.removeProperty("overflow");return}this.internalStart()}}internalStart(){this.isStopped&&(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!1,this.emit())}stop(){if(!this.isStopped){if(this.options.autoToggle){this.rootElement.style.setProperty("overflow","clip");return}this.internalStop()}}internalStop(){this.isStopped||(this.reset(),this.isStopped=!0,this.emit())}raf=e=>{let t=e-(this.time||e);this.time=e,this.animate.advance(t*.001),this.options.autoRaf&&(this._rafId=requestAnimationFrame(this.raf))};scrollTo(e,{offset:t=0,immediate:s=!1,lock:i=!1,programmatic:n=!0,lerp:o=n?this.options.lerp:void 0,duration:r=n?this.options.duration:void 0,easing:l=n?this.options.easing:void 0,onStart:a,onComplete:c,force:d=!1,userData:u}={}){if((this.isStopped||this.isLocked)&&!d)return;let p=e,T=t;if(typeof p=="string"&&["top","left","start","#"].includes(p))p=0;else if(typeof p=="string"&&["bottom","right","end"].includes(p))p=this.limit;else{let m=null;if(typeof p=="string"?(m=document.querySelector(p),m||(p==="#top"?p=0:console.warn("Lenis: Target not found",p))):p instanceof HTMLElement&&p?.nodeType&&(m=p),m){if(this.options.wrapper!==window){let f=this.rootElement.getBoundingClientRect();T-=this.isHorizontal?f.left:f.top}let h=m.getBoundingClientRect();p=(this.isHorizontal?h.left:h.top)+this.animatedScroll}}if(typeof p=="number"){if(p+=T,p=Math.round(p),this.options.infinite){if(n){this.targetScroll=this.animatedScroll=this.scroll;let m=p-this.animatedScroll;m>this.limit/2?p-=this.limit:m<-this.limit/2&&(p+=this.limit)}}else p=Eo(0,p,this.limit);if(p===this.targetScroll){a?.(this),c?.(this);return}if(this.userData=u??{},s){this.animatedScroll=this.targetScroll=p,this.setScroll(this.scroll),this.reset(),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()});return}n||(this.targetScroll=p),typeof r=="number"&&typeof l!="function"?l=xo:typeof l=="function"&&typeof r!="number"&&(r=1),this.animate.fromTo(this.animatedScroll,p,{duration:r,easing:l,lerp:o,onStart:()=>{i&&(this.isLocked=!0),this.isScrolling="smooth",a?.(this)},onUpdate:(m,h)=>{this.isScrolling="smooth",this.lastVelocity=this.velocity,this.velocity=m-this.animatedScroll,this.direction=Math.sign(this.velocity),this.animatedScroll=m,this.setScroll(this.scroll),n&&(this.targetScroll=m),h||this.emit(),h&&(this.reset(),this.emit(),c?.(this),this.userData={},requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this.dispatchScrollendEvent()}),this.preventNextNativeScrollEvent())}})}}preventNextNativeScrollEvent(){this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!0,requestAnimationFrame(()=>{this._preventNextNativeScrollEvent=!1})}hasNestedScroll(e,{deltaX:t,deltaY:s}){let i=Date.now();e._lenis||(e._lenis={});let n=e._lenis,o,r,l,a,c,d,u,p,T,m;if(i-(n.time??0)>2e3){n.time=Date.now();let A=window.getComputedStyle(e);if(n.computedStyle=A,o=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(A.overflowX),r=["auto","overlay","scroll"].includes(A.overflowY),c=["auto"].includes(A.overscrollBehaviorX),d=["auto"].includes(A.overscrollBehaviorY),n.hasOverflowX=o,n.hasOverflowY=r,!(o||r))return!1;u=e.scrollWidth,p=e.scrollHeight,T=e.clientWidth,m=e.clientHeight,l=u>T,a=p>m,n.isScrollableX=l,n.isScrollableY=a,n.scrollWidth=u,n.scrollHeight=p,n.clientWidth=T,n.clientHeight=m,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX=c,n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY=d}else l=n.isScrollableX,a=n.isScrollableY,o=n.hasOverflowX,r=n.hasOverflowY,u=n.scrollWidth,p=n.scrollHeight,T=n.clientWidth,m=n.clientHeight,c=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorX,d=n.hasOverscrollBehaviorY;if(!(o&&l||r&&a))return!1;let h=Math.abs(t)>=Math.abs(s)?"horizontal":"vertical",f,v,w,x,b,_;if(h==="horizontal")f=Math.round(e.scrollLeft),v=u-T,w=t,x=o,b=l,_=c;else if(h==="vertical")f=Math.round(e.scrollTop),v=p-m,w=s,x=r,b=a,_=d;else return!1;return!_&&(f>=v||f<=0)?!0:(w>0?f<v:f>0)&&x&&b}get rootElement(){return this.options.wrapper===window?document.documentElement:this.options.wrapper}get limit(){return this.options.naiveDimensions?this.isHorizontal?this.rootElement.scrollWidth-this.rootElement.clientWidth:this.rootElement.scrollHeight-this.rootElement.clientHeight:this.dimensions.limit[this.isHorizontal?"x":"y"]}get isHorizontal(){return this.options.orientation==="horizontal"}get actualScroll(){let e=this.options.wrapper;return this.isHorizontal?e.scrollX??e.scrollLeft:e.scrollY??e.scrollTop}get scroll(){return this.options.infinite?Lr(this.animatedScroll,this.limit):this.animatedScroll}get progress(){return this.limit===0?1:this.scroll/this.limit}get isScrolling(){return this._isScrolling}set isScrolling(e){this._isScrolling!==e&&(this._isScrolling=e,this.updateClassName())}get isStopped(){return this._isStopped}set isStopped(e){this._isStopped!==e&&(this._isStopped=e,this.updateClassName())}get isLocked(){return this._isLocked}set isLocked(e){this._isLocked!==e&&(this._isLocked=e,this.updateClassName())}get isSmooth(){return this.isScrolling==="smooth"}get className(){let e="lenis";return this.options.autoToggle&&(e+=" lenis-autoToggle"),this.isStopped&&(e+=" lenis-stopped"),this.isLocked&&(e+=" lenis-locked"),this.isScrolling&&(e+=" lenis-scrolling"),this.isScrolling==="smooth"&&(e+=" lenis-smooth"),e}updateClassName(){this.cleanUpClassName(),this.rootElement.className=`${this.rootElement.className} ${this.className}`.trim()}cleanUpClassName(){this.rootElement.className=this.rootElement.className.replace(/lenis(-\w+)?/g,"").trim()}};function Ro(){let e=!1;if(e){o();return}let t=[],s=Ii(.67,0,.27,1),i=Oi("body");Ae({defaults:{duration:700,ease:s}}).add(".intro_title",{translateX:(a,c)=>c===0?["100%","0%"]:["-100%","0%"],duration:500,delay:250},0).add(".intro_holder video",{scale:[0,.5]},750).add(".intro_center",{translateX:(a,c)=>{let d=a.getBoundingClientRect(),u=parseFloat(getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).fontSize)*.875;return c===0?-(d.left-u):window.innerWidth-d.right-u}},750).add(".intro_holder video",{scale:1}).add(".intro",{backgroundColor:"rgba(255,255,255,0)",duration:250}).call(()=>{let a=document.querySelector(".intro_holder video"),c=document.querySelector(".home_cms--link");!a||!c||(i.record(),c.prepend(a),a.classList.add("active"),i.animate({duration:1e3,ease:s,onComplete:()=>{Qt(".intro",{opacity:0,duration:600}),e=!0,o()}}))});function o(){document.querySelectorAll(".home_item").forEach((a,c)=>{let d=c%2===0,u=Pi({target:a,sync:!1,repeat:!1,onEnter:()=>{e&&Qt(a,{clipPath:d?["inset(0% 100% 100% 0%)","inset(0% 0% 0% 0%)"]:["inset(0% c=a.querySelector(".home_flw--crs");a.addEventListener("mousemove",d=>{let u=a.getBoundingClientRect(),p=c.getBoundingClientRect(),T=p.width/2,m=p.height/2,h=Math.min(Math.max(d.clientX-u.left,T),u.width-T),f=Math.min(Math.max(d.clientY-u.top,m),u.height-m);c.style.transform=`translate(${h-T}px, r=new No({infinite:!0,smoothTouch:!0,syncTouch:!0,touchMultiplier:1.5});function l(a){r.raf(a),requestAnimationFrame(l)}requestAnimationFrame(l)}function Lo(){let e=[".about_p",".about_work",".about_text",".about_social"],t=Ae(),s=1e3,i=10,n=0;e.forEach(T=>{Xs.$(T).forEach(m=>{let h=qi(m,{words:{wrap:"clip"}}),f=h.words.length,v=s+i*f;T===".about_p"&&(n=v);let o=document.querySelector(".section.about"),r=document.querySelector(".i-blob"),l=Ei(r,{x:{duration:800,ease:"out(3)"},y:{duration:800,ease:"out(3)"},rotate:{duration:600,ease:"linear",unit:"rad"}}),a=0,c=0,d=Math.PI,u=.5,p=o.getBoundingClientRect();window.addEventListener("resize",()=>p=o.getBoundingClientRect()),o.addEventListener("mousemove",T=>{let{width:m,height:h,left:f,top:v}=p,w=(T.clientX-f-m/2)*u,x=(T.clientY-v-h/2)*u;l.x(w),l.y(x);let b=Math.atan2(T.clientY-v-h/2,T.clientX-f-m/2),_=b-c;a+=_>d?_-2*d:_<-d?_+2*d:_,c=b,l.rotate(a*u)})}function Po(){let e=document.querySelectorAll('[filter-lp="filters"] d=s==="all"||c.getAttribute("filter-lp-field")===s,u=c.closest(".work_item");u.classList.toggle("off",!d),u.querySelector(".work_title").classList.toggle("off",!d)})})}),o.forEach(l=>{l.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active");let a=l.querySelector(".work_link"),c=l.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb");a&&(a.style.display="none"),c.forEach(d=>d.style.opacity="0")}),o.forEach(l=>{l.addEventListener("mouseover",()=>{l.classList.contains("off")||l!==r&&(r&&(r.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.remove("is-active"),Qt(r.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:0,duration:300,ease:"outQuad"}),Qt(r.querySelector(".work_link"),{display:"none",pointerEvents:"none",duration:0})),l.querySelector(".work_title")?.classList.add("is-active"),Qt(l.querySelector(".work_link"),{display:"block",pointerEvents:"auto",duration:0}),Qt(l.querySelectorAll(".work_thumb"),{opacity:1,duration:300,ease:"outQuad"}),r=l)},{signal:n})})}console.log("Getting in App JS");document.body.scrollTop=0;document.documentElement.scrollTop=0;function Io(){document.querySelector("#time").textContent=new de{onLeave({from:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:1},{opacity:0}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}onEnter({to:t,done:s}){t.animate([{opacity:0},{opacity:1}],{duration:400,easing:"ease",fill:"forwards"}).finished.then(s)}},Yi=class extends ue{initialLoad(){this.onEnter()}onEnter(){this.content.querySelectorAll("video[autoplay]").forEach(s=>{s.play().catch(()=>{})});let
